## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**INV_ALT_PRICE** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (LOCN->LOCATION, PART->PART)

**INV_BOM_USE** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOCN -> LOCN); SHIPMENT_LINES (ORDER_LN->ORDER_REC, ORDER_NO->ORDER_NO, ORDER_SEQ->ORDER_SUFFIX)

**INV_BTCH_GL_DIS** -> GL_MASTER (GL -> GL_ACCOUNT); ORDER_HEADER (ORDNO -> ORDER_NO); SHIPMENT_HEADER (SEQ -> ORDER_SUFFIX)

**INV_CNTR_INFO** -> BOL_CONTAINERS (CNTNR_CODE -> CNTNR_CODE); INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOCN -> LOCN); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**INV_CROSS_REF** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUSTOMER -> CUSTOMER); INVENTORY_MSTR (LOCATION->LOCATION, PART->PART); PART_XREF_USER (CUSTOMER_PART->CUST_PART, MFG_PART->MFG_PART); VENDOR_MASTER (VENDOR -> VENDOR)

**INV_DESCR_LANG** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); LANG_CODE (LANG_CD -> ISO_CODE); LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOCN -> LOCN); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**INV_DTL_IOWA** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOCN -> LOCN); ORDER_HIST_HEAD (INVOICE -> INVOICE); PO_HEADER (PO -> PURCHASE_ORDER); PO_LINES (PO_LINE -> RECORD_NO); PO_RECEIVER (RECEIVER -> RECEIVER_NO); UM_CODES (UM -> CODE); VENDOR_MASTER (VENDOR -> VENDOR)

**INV_EXTRA_USR_DEF** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (PART_20 -> PART); LOCATION_ADDRESS (PART_LOC -> LOCN)
